# Select search intent

Use `brief.md` and `research.md` to return `intent.md`.

Identify the primary reader job and classify the dominant intent
(`informational`, `commercial`, `transactional`, or `navigational`), noting
secondary intent only when evidence supports it. Explain the SERP and provider
signals behind the choice, audience awareness, questions to answer, objections,
and the useful next action. Select a primary topic/keyword and bounded secondary
terms without fabricating search volume.

End with an `## Alignment contract` that states the promise the outline and
article must fulfill, required claims, excluded tangents, and conversion goal.
End with `<!-- COMPLETE -->`.
